{{Quote|How 'bout we jes say I'm a middleman?|Lando's Corusca gem broker|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''</ref>}}
After they were mined and packed on [[automated cargo pod]]s, [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]] that were mined by [[GemDiver Station]] were sent to '''[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] Corusca gem broker''', who lived and did business on [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]]. He was responsible for the actual selling of the gems to interested parties. Though his contract with Calrissian allowed for him to reap only a small percentage of the profits made by selling the gems, this was offset by their extreme value.

The gem broker zealously guarded the identities of his customers from Calrissian, reasoning that if Calrissian knew who they were, he would then lose his status as a middleman. However, his professional ethics could be tossed out of the viewport the price was right.

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]]—traveling under the assumed names of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Iltar]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Beknit]]—discovered as much when they were trying to find out who had bought the industrial-grade Corusca gems that had ironically been used to penetrate the hull of GemDiver Station during the [[Raid on GemDiver Station|kidnapping]] of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], and [[Lowbacca]]. The gem broker was adamant that the names of his customers not be divulged, but a necklace of Corusca gems managed to make him quite willing to tell them that a Nightsister had purchased a large amount of industrial-grade industrial gems recently.

==Personality and traits==
Lando's broker was a heavily bearded man who walked with a limp.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]'' {{1st}}
